data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet for a fantasy RPG enemy. Exact layout: 2 rows by 2 columns, 4 equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. Solid flat chroma-key background only: #FF00FF magenta, no texture, no gradients, no floor, no shadow, no borders, no visible grid lines. Subject: a normal-style ranged enemy for Samsara Ascension, a corrupted xianxia spell archer. Narrow agile silhouette, dark teal and ash robe, small bow or talisman focus kept close to the body, clean hand-painted 2D fantasy sprite, readable at small size, not cute, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Full body visible in every cell, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered, same body height and same pixel scale in every frame, stable bottom/feet anchor line when grounded. Subject should fill about 58–66% of each cell with generous magenta margin. 

Animation: walk cycle with real pose changes. Frame 1 top-left: first stride, front limb/leading side moves forward, body leans in travel direction. Frame 2 top-right: passing step, body rises, rear limb/trailing side catches up, cloth or a few petals trail backward. Frame 3 bottom-left: opposite stride, other limb/side moves forward, weight clearly shifts. Frame 4 bottom-right: passing step returning toward neutral, body lowers slightly; loop reads as movement. 

Preserve exact same identity, silhouette family, palette, face/eyes/core face, costume marks, weapon/focus, and material language in every cell; only pose, compact clothing motion, limbs, hair, petals, weapon angle, and small attached aura may change. Keep the entire subject and any weapon, horn, petal, hair, sleeve, tail, talisman, or tiny attached aura fully inside each cell; nothing may cross a cell edge. No detached projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no long trail, no dust cloud. Clean HD hand-painted fantasy RPG sprite, crisp readable silhouette, consistent lighting, no text, no labels, no numbers, no UI, no watermark, no extra characters, no cropped body parts, no alternate forms.
